title: Triplast Brown ECO Kraft Paper (400mm x 30m) - Eco-Conscious & Recyclable - Multipurpose Wrapping Paper Roll with a Premium & Rustic Finish - Ideal for Gift Wrapping, Parcel Packing, Arts & Craft
features: Premium Rustic Finish: Enjoy a professional and elegant look with this uncoated, rustic paper that adds a touch of sophistication to your packaging
Versatile Use: Ideal for gift wrapping, parcel packing, arts & crafts, and more, this paper offers multiple uses around the home, office, or school
Easy Handling: Conforms to any shape or size with clean, crisp fold lines, ensuring no tearing or fraying during use
Durable & Lightweight: At 90 gsm thick, this paper offers the perfect balance between strength and weight, making it easy to handle and use
Eco-conscious: Made from 100% recycled material & fully kerbside recyclable - this product is a budget-friendly, plastic-free packaging solution
description: Product Description Triplast's Brown ECO Kraft Paper is a sustainable gift wrapping, arts & craft and packaging essential with a wide range of uses. Key Features Premium: It has a rustic look and feel offering an elegant & professional finish. Kind to the planet: Made from 100% recycled material and is itself fully kerbside recyclable and biodeg. Strong & Light: It is manufactured to a thickness of 90 gsm to offer the perfect balance between strength and weight. Easy Handling: Conforms to any shape or size with clean & crisp fold lines - no tearing or fraying. It can be easily cut to size with a scissor or cutter and is compatible with all standard packaging tapes. Multiple Uses Business Use: Its professional finish & easy handling make it ideal for use as parcel wrapping and packing paper or void filler. It can also be placed between items in layers for protection. Home Use: While it is most commonly used as gift wrapping paper, it can also be used a table runner during parties or protective cover for floors, walls & furniture. Office or School Use: It can be used as a liner for bulletin boards or notice boards, drawing paper or even a photography back drop. Arts & Crafts: Its high strength and flexibility make it perfect for all paper craft activities such scrap-booking, card making, origami and album making. A must-have in every shop, home, office & classroom Gift wrapping for any occasion (Christmas, anniversary, birthdays and more). Create a rustic and clean look along with the added benefit of being compatible with all kinds of tapes. Keep shelves, cabinets, tables, floors and any other surfaces protected from drips, leaks & spills. Create a safe space for your next arts project by protecting your carpet or art tables from paint splatters. If you are looking for a quick and easy way to clean up after a party or an event then Brown ECO Kraft Paper is a great option. Just cover up the desired surface and remove it at the end; is that easy. It is strong and durable and can be used as lining for bulletin boards. It can be used at home or in classroom as a great way to organize information. About Triplast We are a UK based manufacturer, distributor and supplier of packaging products & office supplies including cardboard boxes, bubble wrap, kraft wrapping paper, corrugated cardboard paper, plastic mailing bags, bubble padded envelopes, cardboard & paper envelopes and other ecommerce, retail & industrial packaging products. Our years of experience and well established presence in the flexible packaging industry coupled with our state-of-the-art automated machinery means you can be rest assured when buying our products. We have great confidence in our products but if for any reason you are unhappy with your purchase, please send us a message and we promise to revert to you with a swift resolution.
